overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront at dusk. The player character walks from a covered neon-lit plaza through a commercial corridor to an open waterfront promenade with palm trees, then along the water with views of the illuminated city skyline and flying vehicles, before continuing under an elevated highway structure. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza toward the yellow-striped crosswalk

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the crosswalk in same direction as camera

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure with rectangular skylights and red neon strip lighting
street sign indicating California Ave mounted on pole
horizontal pink-red neon light strips embedded in the ceiling structure
large rectangular concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza beneath a concrete structure with distinctive red neon lighting. The camera moves forward across a yellow-striped crosswalk, passing concrete pillars and approaching a commercial corridor. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and a parked vehicle is visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with neon signs leading to waterfront

events.description: exits covered corridor into open waterfront promenade with palm trees visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial passage with neon storefronts, emerging toward the waterfront

entered.detail: lower concrete ceiling of the corridor passage between buildings
green neon sign with CYBER text on the left wall
tall palm trees becoming visible at the end of the corridor
vertical illuminated advertising display with colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrower commercial corridor with a green neon sign visible on the left. The environment transitions from fully covered to partially open as palm trees and the waterfront become visible ahead. The ground changes to paved tiles, and digital advertising kiosks appear along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with ocean view and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade observing the ocean view and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: walking along the waterfront path ahead of the camera

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the waterfront overlooking the water
expansive view of the ocean water with distant shoreline visible
distant illuminated skyscrapers visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide waterfront promenade with wet reflective pavement and palm trees lining the path. The camera moves forward with the ocean visible beyond the railing and the distant city skyline illuminated against the dusk sky. Digital advertising kiosks stand along the walkway, and the environment is fully exposed to the open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with city skyline and flying vehicle traffic

events.description: turns right to view the city skyline and flying vehicles over the water
flying vehicle passes by in the sky above the water

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at the illuminated city skyline and flying vehicles before continuing along the path

notable_agents.action: flying car hovering and moving across the sky over the water

entered.detail: futuristic flying car with lights hovering above the water
tall modern glass buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to reveal a panoramic view of the city skyline across the water, with illuminated glass skyscrapers dominating the horizon. A flying vehicle hovers and moves across the sky, adding to the futuristic atmosphere. The waterfront railing now appears to the left as the camera reorients along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with neon lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered waterfront path under the elevated highway with neon-lit billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction along the covered path

entered.detail: large red-brown elevated highway or monorail track overhead with concrete supports
large illuminated advertising screen showing colorful graphics on the wall
wall-mounted neon lights illuminating the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway beneath a massive elevated highway structure, returning to an environment with artificial neon lighting. Digital billboards and neon fixtures illuminate the path while palm trees continue to line the right side. The ocean view is now obscured by the overhead structure as the camera continues forward along the waterfront path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon plaza through an open waterfront promenade and back into the shadow of a massive urban structure. It begins beneath a concrete ceiling bathed in red neon, moving across a yellow-striped crosswalk and past concrete pillars toward a commercial corridor. As the camera passes a green neon sign and digital kiosks, the environment transitions from a covered walkway to a wide, open-air promenade featuring wet reflective pavement and palm trees. The scene then expands to reveal a panoramic view of the illuminated city skyline and a hovering flying vehicle across the water before the camera reorients along the railing. Finally, the view of the ocean is obscured as the camera enters a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, returning to a space defined by artificial neon lighting and digital billboards.
